description: Creates a book-like index from words defined in a code block by searching your vault. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.name: Book Index

name: Book Index

releases.author: usero2
releases.description:
### v1.0.1
- **Live Refresh Button**: Added a dedicated `Refresh` button next to the search bar. Instantly rebuild your index when other files change without needing to close and reopen the note.
- **Improved Special Character Trimming**: The "Trim Numbers & Special Characters" setting has been optimized to only trim characters from the *beginning* of words, preserving important trailing characters.

releases.author: usero2
releases.description:
# Initial release

# Obsidian Book Index Plugin

Creates a beautiful, interactive "Book-like Index" for your Obsidian vault. 

This plugin automatically scans your vault and generates an alphabetized index of your most important terms, concepts, and keywords—just like the index at the back of a textbook! It completely automates the process of finding where terms are mentioned and links directly to the exact line in your notes.
